desc.en: Reset the accumulated power usage (kWh), note that this can not be reversed.

instruction.en:
1. Swipe up 
2. Press "Settings" 3. Navigate to "Connection".
4. Tap "Start add/remove mode".
5. The thermostat will search for a Z-Wave network and confirm when inclusion/exclusion is complete.

hint.en:
Lifeline. All run-time reporting is addressed to this group. Only one node can be assigned to this association group. 
Default: 1.1 (Homey's ID)

Binary Switch Set COOLING: This controls external devices replicating the state of the NO Cooling terminal. 
Uses BASIC_SET command, values 0x00 (on) and 0xFF (on).

Binary Switch Set HEATING: This controls external devices replicating the state of the NO Heating terminal. 
Uses BASIC_SET command, values 0x00 (on) and 0xFF (on).
Sends Thermostat Setpoint Set commands based on own setpoint to allow for use as master thermostat.
Sends Thermostat Mode Set commands based on own setpoint to allow for use as master thermostat.
Sends Thermostat Fan Mode Set commands based on own Fan mode to allow for use as master thermostat.
Binary Switch Set Fan speed Low: Sends BASIC_SET when the fan is running at low speed.
Binary Switch Set Fan speed Medium: Sends BASIC_SET when the fan is running at medium speed.
Binary Switch Set Fan speed High: Sends BASIC_SET when the fan is running at high speed.
External dimmer/shutter control 1: Sends Multilevel Switch Set and Start/Stop Level Change to control dimmers or roller shutters.
External dimmer/shutter control 2: Sends Multilevel Switch Set and Start/Stop Level Change to control dimmers or roller shutters.
External dimmer/shutter control 3: Sends Multilevel Switch Set and Start/Stop Level Change to control dimmers or roller shutters.
External dimmer/shutter control 4: Sends Multilevel Switch Set and Start/Stop Level Change to control dimmers or roller shutters.
External relay control 1: Sends Binary Switch Set (ON/OFF) to control an external relay.
External relay control 2: Sends Binary Switch Set (ON/OFF) to control an external relay.
External relay control 3: Sends Binary Switch Set (ON/OFF) to control an external relay.
External relay control 4: Sends Binary Switch Set (ON/OFF) to control an external relay.
